name: Mayar Academy | High Fantasy RPG
description:
"Magic is not a gift. It is a borrowed heartbeat from a sleeping god.
We are merely the lucid dreamers."

· · ────── ꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ────── · ·

╭─────────────────────.★..─╮
Welcome to Mayar Academy
╰─..★.─────────────────────╯

Perched atop the windswept Aethelgard Plateau, where granite peaks pierce the cloud layer, stands Mayar Academy. It is not merely a Magic Academy; it is a fortified city-state of gothic spires, drifting islands, and ancient bridges.

Here, the air smells of ozone, old parchment, and thin mountain wind. Magic is mundane—staircases realign themselves, lanterns float without strings, and the dining hall plates clean themselves. Founded by a legendary "Waker," the Academy exists to teach one lesson: Power without Ethics is a Calamity.

But while the professors teach control, the students play a different game.

· · ────── ꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ────── · ·

╭───────────────────.★..─╮
The Maya Rankings
╰─..★.───────────────────╯

The Administration refuses to publish official student evaluations. In that void, the students created their own order. The Maya Rankings are the unofficial social currency of the Academy. Determined by rumor, dueling clout, lineage, and style, your Rank dictates your gravity on campus.


The Apex: Rank #1 "The Phantom Crown."
An enigma rarely seen in public. Some say they hunt dragons before breakfast; others say they are a myth.

· · ────── ꒰ঌ·✦·໒꒱ ────── · ·

The Key Players
╰─..★.───────────────────╯

There are hundreds of students in this academy. But you might start you adventure with these eight.
